projectAccess.noAccessTitle: You don’t have access to this project
projectAccess.noAccessDescription: This project is private. Ask a project admin to add you, or switch to a project you can access.
projectAccess.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to this project
projectAccess.readOnlyBoardBanner: Read-only access — you can view this board but can’t move or edit cards.

actions.pickIssueToLink: Pick a work item to link.
actions.ownerOnlyReplay: Only a workspace owner can replay jobs.
actions.dlqGone: That dead-letter entry no longer exists.
actions.cannotLeaveLastMember: You can't leave as the last member — delete the workspace instead.
actions.noProjectForIssue: Pick or create a project before adding a work item.
actions.titleRequired: Give the work item a title.
actions.titleTooLong: Title must be {max} characters or fewer.
actions.noProjectForParent: Pick or create a project before choosing a parent.
actions.couldNotLink: Could not link the selected work items.

links.notFound: That work item no longer exists.
links.selfLink: A work item can't link to itself.
links.cycle: That would create a dependency cycle.
links.crossWorkspace: That work item is in another workspace.

workItems.ILLEGAL_PARENT_TYPE: Illegal parent for this work-item kind.
workItems.DEPTH_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Work-item tree depth limit (4 levels) exceeded.
workItems.PARENT_CYCLE: Re-parenting would create a cycle in the work-item tree.
workItems.KEY_CONFLICT: A work item with this key or identifier already exists in the project.
workItems.CROSS_PROJECT_PARENT: A work item parent must belong to the same project as the child.
workItems.REPORTER_NOT_IN_WORKSPACE: The reporter is not a member of this workspace.
workItems.ASSIGNEE_NOT_IN_WORKSPACE: The assignee is not a member of this workspace.
workItems.UNKNOWN_STATUS: Unknown status "{statusKey}" for this project's workflow.
workItems.STALE_WORK_ITEM: This work item was edited by someone else. Refresh and try again.

workflow.NOT_PROJECT_ADMIN: Only a project admin can edit the workflow.
workflow.STATUS_KEY_CONFLICT: A status with key "{key}" already exists in this project.
workflow.STATUS_IN_USE: Status "{statusKey}" is still used by {count} work item(s) and can't be deleted.
workflow.INVALID_REASSIGN_TARGET: Pick a different status in this project to move the items to.
workflow.DEFAULT_STATUS_PROTECTED: "{statusKey}" is a default status — only its color can be changed.
workflow.CANNOT_DELETE_INITIAL_STATUS: Status "{statusKey}" is the initial status and can't be deleted.
workflow.CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_TERMINAL_STATUS: Status "{statusKey}" is the only terminal status — a project needs at least one.

upload.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large — please choose a smaller file.
upload.RATE_LIMITED: Too many uploads — please wait a moment and try again.

invite.subject: You're invited to join {workspace} on Prodect
invite.preview: {inviter} invited you to join {workspace} on Prodect
invite.lede: {inviter} invited you to join {workspace} on Prodect.
invite.fallback: Or copy this link into your browser:
invite.ignore: Don't know {inviter}? You can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your Prodect password
passwordReset.lede: We received a request to reset your Prodect password.
passwordReset.fallback: Or copy this link into your browser:
passwordReset.expires: This link expires in 1 hour. If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

auth.signInSubhead: Use Prodect to turn any product idea into reality.
auth.googleSignInIncomplete: Google sign-in didn't complete. Try again, or use email.
auth.googleSignUpIncomplete: Google sign-up didn't complete. Try again, or use email.
auth.wrongPassword: That password isn't right. Try again, or reset it.
auth.signUpSubhead: Sign up to turn any product idea into reality.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.emailHelper: We'll use this to sign you in.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.checkInboxSubhead: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a one-time link to reset your password. The link expires in 1 hour.
auth.checkSpam: Check spam, or try another email.
auth.resetSubhead: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send a one-time link.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many reset requests from this device. Please wait an hour and try again.
auth.couldntReachServer: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.linkExpiredSubhead: Reset links expire after 1 hour for security. Request a new one to continue.
auth.passwordUpdatedSubhead: You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.setNewPasswordSubhead: Pick something you haven't used before — at least 8 characters.
auth.inviteExpiredSubhead: Invites are valid for 7 days. Ask the inviter for a new link if you'd still like to join.
auth.inviteUsed: This invite has already been used
auth.inviteUsedSubhead: If you joined from another email, sign in with that account.
auth.signInWithInvitedEmail: Sign in with the invited email
auth.wrongEmailSubhead: This invite is for {invitedEmail}. You're signed in as {currentEmail}. Sign in with the invited email to accept, or ask the inviter to re-send to your address.
auth.inviteAcceptFailed: This invite could not be accepted. Refresh to see details.

project.emptyDescription: Projects group your work items and give them a key like PROD-1. Create one to start planning.
project.identifierTaken: That identifier is already taken. Try a different one.
project.identifierHelper: 3–5 uppercase characters. Work items will be keyed {preview}-1, {preview}-2, …

stub.archivedDescription: Switch to another project to continue working.

createIssue.title: Create work item
createIssue.titleRequired: Give the work item a title.
createIssue.titleTooLong: Title must be {max} characters or fewer.
createIssue.titlePlaceholder: Summarize the work in a line
createIssue.draftWithAiTooltip: AI drafting arrives with the planning layer (Epic 7)
createIssue.explanationSkip: Skip this — explanation can be drafted with AI or added after creating.

links.helper: Choose a relationship · links are created together with the work item.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Shortcuts available anywhere in the app.

issueViews.heading: Work Items
issueViews.noProjectListDescription: Pick or create a project from the switcher to track its work items.
issueViews.noProjectDetailDescription: Pick a project from the switcher to view its work items.
issueViews.noProjectEditDescription: Pick a project from the switcher to edit its work items.
issueViews.filterComingSoon: Filtering arrives in a later update
issueViews.noIssuesDescription: Create your first work item to start tracking work.
issueViews.noMatchingDescription: No work items match the current filters. Try adjusting or clearing them.
issueViews.quickViewMore: Explanation, relationships, attachments, and the activity feed live on the <link>full page</link>.
issueViews.quickViewUnavailableDescription: {key} may have been moved, deleted, or it’s in a workspace you don’t have access to.
issueViews.removeConfirmAfter: ? The work item isn’t deleted — only the link.
issueViews.changedElsewhereRefreshing: This work item changed elsewhere — refreshing.
issueViews.title: Title
issueViews.staleBanner: This work item was edited by someone else. Refresh to see the latest.

readiness.waiting: Waiting on {count, plural, one {# work item} other {# work items}}

empty.title: No workspace yet
empty.description: Create a workspace from the switcher in the top-left to get started.

workspace.title: Workspace settings
workspace.subtitle: Manage your workspace name, members, and lifecycle.

name.heading: Workspace name
name.helper: Visible to everyone in this workspace.

members.heading: Members
members.inviteModalDescription: They'll get an email with a one-time link. Links expire in 7 days.
members.errorAlreadyMember: {email} is already a member of this workspace.
members.errorRateLimited: You've already sent 3 invites to this address in the last hour. Please wait before trying again.
members.errorGeneric: Could not send the invite. Please try again.
members.errorUnexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

danger.heading: Danger zone
danger.leaveWorkspaceDesc: You'll lose access to all data in this workspace.
danger.lastMemberTooltip: You're the last member — delete the workspace instead.
danger.deleteWorkspaceDesc: Permanently delete this workspace and all its data. This cannot be undone.
danger.deleteModalDesc: This will permanently delete the workspace and all its data (projects, work items, members). This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No project yet
empty.description: Create a project from the switcher in the top-left to get started.

project.title: Project settings
project.subtitle: Configure the active project and manage its lifecycle.

archive.title: Archive project
archive.description: Hides this project from the switcher and lists. Work items and history are preserved.
archive.modalDesc: Archiving hides this project from the switcher and lists. Its work items and history are preserved — you can restore the project later. This does not delete any data.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.cardDescription: The statuses a work item can hold in this project, and the legal moves between them.

empty.description: Create a project from the switcher in the top-left to manage its workflow.

workflow.pageDescription: The statuses a work item can hold in {projectName}, and the legal moves between them. {editHint}
workflow.editHintReader: Only a project admin can edit these.
workflow.policyOpenDesc: Open mode: any status can transition to any other.
workflow.policyRestrictedDesc: Restricted mode: only the transitions below are allowed.
workflow.tableCaption: Each cell is a legal move from the row status to the column status.
workflow.restoreModalDesc: This re-adds the standard transitions (the allowed moves between statuses) that are missing from this project's workflow. It does not remove any transitions you added, and it doesn't touch your statuses — nothing you've set up is lost.
workflow.reassignAffected: {count, plural, one {# work item still use this status. Choose a status to move it to — then “{label}” is removed.} other {# work items still use this status. Choose a status to move them to — then “{label}” is removed.}}
workflow.defaultStatusNote: <name></name> is a default status — only its color can be changed.

board.title: Board
board.cardDescription: Columns and which statuses each column shows.
board.subtitle: Columns, status mapping, swimlanes and WIP limits for the board below. Each board has its own configuration.
board.notFoundDescription: This board doesn’t exist in this project, or you don’t have access to it. Pick a board from the switcher above.
board.noBoardDescription: This project doesn’t have a board configured yet, so there are no columns to manage.
board.boardNameHint: Shown in the board header on the Boards page.
board.unmappedHint: Drag onto a column, or use a column’s “Add status” menu.
board.unmappedEmpty: Every status is on the board — nothing is hidden.
board.unmappedDropAria: Unmap a status by dropping it here
board.columnEmpty: No statuses yet — map one from the rail.
board.readOnlyBanner: You have read-only access to board settings. Ask a project admin to add, rename, or remap columns.
board.deleteBody: Its mapped statuses return to Unmapped statuses — work items keep their status and are not deleted; they’re just hidden from the board until the status is mapped again.
board.deleteNoStatuses: This column maps no statuses, so nothing returns to Unmapped.
board.guardBody: Its mapped statuses still hold {count} work items on the board. Map those statuses to another column first, then delete this one. No work item is ever removed by a board change.
board.toastMapError: Couldn’t map {status} to that column. It was returned.
board.toastUnmapError: Couldn’t unmap {status}. It was returned to the column.
board.toastAddColumnError: Couldn’t add the column. Try again.
board.toastRenameColumnError: Couldn’t rename the column. Try again.
board.toastReorderColumnError: Couldn’t reorder the column. The order was restored.
board.toastDeleteColumnError: Couldn’t delete the column. Try again.
board.toastLastColumnError: A board must keep at least one column.
board.toastColumnNotEmptyError: “{name}” still holds work items — remap its statuses first.
board.toastRenameBoardError: Couldn’t rename the board. The previous name was restored.
board.errorDescription: Something went wrong loading this board’s configuration. Try again.

estimation.title: Estimation
estimation.cardDescription: Set the estimation statistic and point scale for this project.
estimation.pageDescription: How this project sizes work — the planning estimate the backlog, board, and roll-ups display.

empty.description: Create a project to configure its estimation settings.

estimation.cardSubtitle: Applies to every board and sprint in this project.
estimation.statisticHint: Which measure is THE estimate that rolls up to sprints and epics.
estimation.scaleHint: The suggested deck the estimate picker offers. Any number is still allowed — the deck only suggests.
estimation.customHint: The deck the picker offers. Values must be positive numbers.
estimation.savedDesc: Your changes apply to every board and sprint.
estimation.saveError: Your estimation settings weren't saved. Please try again.
estimation.readOnlyBanner: Only project admins can change estimation settings.

access.title: Access & members
access.cardDescription: Who can find, view, and edit this project, and the people on it.
access.subtitle: Control who can see and edit {projectName}. Workspace owners and admins always have access.
access.accessSubheading: Who in the {workspaceName} workspace can reach this project.

levelDesc.open: Any member of the {workspaceName} workspace can view and edit this project.
levelDesc.limited: Any workspace member can view and comment, but only project members can edit.
levelDesc.private: Only people added to the project below can find or open it. Hidden from everyone else.

access.goPrivateNote: The {count, plural, one {# person} other {# people}} who can currently access {projectName} will be added as project members so no one loses access. You can adjust roles or remove them in the Members list.
access.addMemberEmpty: No workspace members left to add.
access.addMemberHint: Members already on the project are hidden.
access.readOnlyNote: Only project admins can add members or change access.
access.errorLastAdmin: This is the only project admin — assign another admin first.
access.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

jobs.title: Job runs
jobs.subtitle: Background jobs for this workspace — delivery of invites & password resets, and any scheduled work. Failed jobs land in the dead-letter queue, where an owner can replay them.
jobs.replayTooltip: Only a workspace owner can replay jobs
jobs.dlqDetailDesc: The failure and the original event payload (replayable as-is).
jobs.dlqEmptyDesc: Every job has succeeded or is still retrying.
jobs.runsEmptyDesc: When a background job runs, it'll appear here.

language.heading: Language
language.helper: Choose the language for the Prodect interface.
language.label: Language

boards.heading: Boards
boards.subtitle: Kanban board for {project}
boards.noProjectDescription: Pick or create a project from the switcher to see its board.
boards.errorDescription: Something went wrong loading this board. Try again.
boards.noBoardDescription: This project doesn’t have a board configured yet.
boards.wipHint: A non-negative whole number. Soft limit — it warns when exceeded but never blocks a drop. Clear to remove the limit.
boards.wipOverLimitAria: {count} of {limit} issues — over the WIP limit
boards.wipSaveErrorDescription: The WIP limit for {column} wasn’t saved. Try again.
boards.dndInstructions: To pick up a card, press Space. While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the card. Press Space again to drop, or Escape to cancel.
boards.announcementPickedUp: Picked up {key}. Over column {col}, position {index} of {count}.
boards.announcementMoved: {key} moved to {col}, position {index} of {count}. Press Space to drop, Escape to cancel.
boards.moveUnmappedDescription: That column maps no status. {key} returned.
boards.moveErrorDescription: Couldn’t move {key}. It was returned to its place.
boards.emptyDescription: This board doesn’t have any work items yet. Create one and it’ll show up here.
boards.unmappedText: These statuses aren’t on this board — work items in them are hidden here:
boards.overCapText: This board has more than {cap, number} work items — refine the board filter to see them all. Only the first {cap, number} are shown.
boards.groupByErrorDescription: Couldn’t change the swimlane grouping. The board is unchanged.
boards.reassignErrorDescription: Couldn’t update {key}. The change was reverted.
boards.lastBoardNote: A project keeps at least one board, so its last board can’t be deleted.
boards.newBoardSeedHint: New boards seed default columns from the project workflow, so they’re usable right away.
boards.deleteBoardBody: This removes the board and its column & swimlane configuration.
boards.deleteBoardCalloutBody: Issues belong to the project, not a board — they stay on Prodect and remain visible on your other boards.
boards.boardCreateErrorDescription: The board couldn’t be created. Please try again.
boards.boardRenameErrorDescription: The board couldn’t be renamed. The change was reverted.
boards.boardSetDefaultErrorDescription: Couldn’t set the default board. The change was reverted.
boards.boardDeleteErrorDescription: The board couldn’t be deleted. The change was reverted.
boards.sprintDaysRemaining: {days, plural, one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}}
boards.sprintEndedTitle: Past the end date — complete this sprint
boards.sprintCompleteLoadErrorDescription: We couldn’t load the sprint details. Try again.
boards.noActiveSprintDescription: This board has no sprint in progress. Plan and start a sprint from the backlog, and its issues will appear here in workflow columns.

ready.heading: Ready to start
ready.subtitle: {project} · {key}
ready.noProjectDescription: Create or select a project to see what’s ready to start.

popover.title: What is "ready"?
popover.body1: A work item is ready when every issue blocking it has been completed — so it has no unfinished blockers and can be started right now.
popover.body2: Click Copy on any row to put its prodect run PROD-… command on your clipboard, then paste it into your own coding agent to dispatch the work.

empty.title: Nothing's ready right now
empty.body: A work item appears here once every issue blocking it is done. Right now nothing is fully unblocked — head to Issues to see what's still in progress and what it's waiting on.

backlog.heading: Backlog
backlog.subtitle: {project} · plan & groom — rank, sprint, estimate
backlog.noProjectDescription: Select or create a project to plan its backlog.
backlog.backlogRegionLabel: Backlog, {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}}
backlog.emptyDescription: Every issue is assigned to a sprint. Create an issue to add to the backlog.
backlog.errorDescription: Something went wrong fetching this project's backlog. Check your connection and try again.
backlog.sprintsErrorDescription: Something went wrong fetching this project's sprints. Check your connection and try again.
backlog.allLoaded: All {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} loaded
backlog.selectionBarLabel: {count, plural, one {# issue selected} other {# issues selected}}
backlog.noSprintsToMove: No sprints to move to. Create one first.
backlog.bulkErrorDescription: The selection couldn't be moved. It's back where it was — please try again.
backlog.createIssueErrorDescription: Something went wrong creating the issue. Please try again.
backlog.sprintEmpty: No issues — drag from the backlog, or use + Create issue.
backlog.startSprintEmpty: Add at least one issue to start the sprint.

startSprintFlow.title: Start sprint
startSprintFlow.subtitle: {sprint} · {project}
startSprintFlow.derivedWindow: {start} → {end} · {days, plural, one {ends in # day} other {ends in # days}}
startSprintFlow.windowInvalid: End date must be after the start date
startSprintFlow.committedSummary: {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} · {points, plural, =0 {—} one {# point} other {# points}} committed at start
startSprintFlow.alreadyActive: {project} already has an active sprint ({sprint}). Complete it first — a project can run one active sprint at a time.
startSprintFlow.alreadyActiveGeneric: {project} already has an active sprint. Complete it first — a project can run one active sprint at a time.
startSprintFlow.errorDescription: Something went wrong starting the sprint. Please try again.

backlog.createSprintErrorDescription: Something went wrong creating the sprint. Please try again.
backlog.moveErrorDescription: {key} couldn't be moved. It's back where it was — please try again.
backlog.dndInstructions: Press Space to pick up an issue, the arrow keys to move it between sprints and the backlog, Space again to drop, or Escape to cancel.

completeSprintFlow.title: Complete sprint
completeSprintFlow.subtitle: {sprint} · {project}
completeSprintFlow.loadError: Couldn't load the sprint summary. Please try again.
completeSprintFlow.completedPointsUnestimated: {completed, plural, =0 {no points estimated} other {# points completed}}
completeSprintFlow.carryOverPoints: {points, plural, =0 {nothing to carry over} one {# point carries over} other {# points carry over}}
completeSprintFlow.chooserLabel: Move the {count, plural, one {# incomplete issue} other {# incomplete issues}} to
completeSprintFlow.carryBacklogSub: Unfinished issues return to the backlog in rank order
completeSprintFlow.carrySprintSub: Roll the unfinished issues into a planned sprint
completeSprintFlow.noPlannedSprints: No planned sprint to roll into — create one in the backlog first.
completeSprintFlow.allComplete: All issues are complete — nothing to carry over.
completeSprintFlow.errorDescription: Something went wrong completing the sprint. Please try again.

sprintReport.heading: Sprint report
sprintReport.title: {name} report
sprintReport.scopeChange: {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} added after the sprint started (scope change)
sprintReport.emptyCompleted: No issues were completed in this sprint.
sprintReport.velocityWindow: Last {count, plural, one {# completed sprint} other {# completed sprints}}
sprintReport.velocityLowHistoryBody: Velocity needs at least 2 completed sprints to show a trend. Complete a sprint to start the chart.
sprintReport.velocityDesc: Velocity over the last {count} completed sprints. Average completed: {average}.
sprintReport.velocityTableCaption: Velocity — committed vs completed {statistic} per sprint. Average completed: {average}.

estimation.saveError: Couldn't update the estimate. Please try again.
